Perfect! The renaming has been completed successfully. Here's a summary of what was done:
## Summary
I've successfully renamed all occurrences of `plan_backend` to `pr_backend` in the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective_helpers.py`.
### Changes Applied:
1. **Line 34**: `ctx.plan_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch(...)` → `ctx.pr_backend.resolve_pr_number_for_branch(...)`
2. **Line 66**: `ctx.plan_backend.get_managed_pr_for_branch(...)` → `ctx.pr_backend.get_managed_pr_for_branch(...)`
### Notes:
- No occurrences of `require_plan_backend` were found in this file - All changes are attribute accesses on the context object (`ctx.plan_backend` → `ctx.pr_backend`) - User-facing strings and comments mentioning "plan" were intentionally left unchanged (as per your instructions) - The file has no imports of `plan_backend` or `require_plan_backend` to rename
